file_insights.purpose: Define color resources for sync status indicators
file_insights.content_summary: XML resource file containing three semantic color definitions for different sync states

patterns_discovered.description: Colors named based on their semantic purpose and state rather than arbitrary names, improving maintainability
Standard Material Design hex color values used, ensuring consistency with Android design guidelines
Color organization follows sync state machine: offline → syncing → online with corresponding visual cues
XML header comments explain the purpose and mapping of each color to sync states

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created sync status color resources on first attempt with proper XML structure, semantic naming, and comprehensive documentation

recommendations.recommendation: Validate color contrast ratios against WCAG guidelines, especially when used in UI text/backgrounds
Consider creating parallel color definitions in values-night/ directory for dark theme support if needed
Define how these colors will be applied in sync status bar/indicators and create corresponding drawable or layout resources
Document the sync state flow and ensure consistent color usage throughout the application
